title: GateCriterion
description:
A single gate criterion with optional requirement traceability.

Extends the concept of [`crate::Criterion`] with a `requirements` field
that links criteria to specific requirement IDs (e.g., `REQ-FUNC-001`).

cmd.description: Optional shell command to verify this criterion.

description.description: Detailed description of what this criterion checks.

enforcement.description:
Enforcement level override for this criterion. `None` means "use the
spec-level default from `[gate]` section" (which itself defaults to `required`).

path.description:
Optional file path to check for existence.
When set (and `cmd` is `None`), the criterion evaluates as a `FileExists` gate.

requirements.description: Requirement IDs this criterion traces to (e.g., `["REQ-FUNC-001"]`).

timeout.description: Optional timeout in seconds for this criterion's command.

Enforcement.description:
Enforcement level for a gate criterion.

Determines whether a criterion failure blocks the gate (required)
or is informational only (advisory).

oneOf.description: Failure blocks the gate. This is the default.
Failure is informational; does not block the gate.
